# Moonlight Run Farm LLC
> Highland Cattle & Specialty Animals — Barre, Massachusetts

## About
Moonlight Run Farm LLC is a regenerative farm in Barre, MA owned by Angela & Jesse Klayman. Both nurses by profession, they bring medical-grade care and full transparency to every animal they raise. The farm was established in 2020 at 1140 South Street, Barre, MA 01005.

## Animals
Scottish Highland Cattle, Llamas, Alpaca, Nigerian Dwarf Goats, Painted Desert Sheep, Yaks, Donkeys, Peafowl, Geese, Chickens, Guinea Fowl, New Zealand Rabbits, Great Pyrenees Dogs.

## Services
- Livestock & Equine Transport: Professional nationwide hauling. DOT / MC compliant, fully insured.
- Educational Programs: Farm education for schools, homeschool groups, scout troops, and families.
- Petting Zoos: Mobile petting zoo for corporate events, birthday parties, weddings, Bar/Bat Mitzvahs, Sweet 16s. We come to your location.
- Livestock Services: Hoof trimming, ear tagging, vaccinations, worming, castration.
- Dog Boarding: Farm vacation stays with supervised outdoor time.
- Animal Sales: Highland Cattle, Nigerian Dwarf Goats, llamas, alpacas, poultry, rabbits. Buyer/seller matching.
- Special Events: On-farm and mobile farm experiences for all occasions.

## Products (Farm Store)
- 100% Grass-Fed Highland Beef (no hormones, no steroids, no antibiotics, federally inspected)
- Pasture Raised Turkey (seasonal, November)
- Pasture Raised Chicken
- Farm Fresh Eggs (chicken & goose)
- Hay (small square bales & round bales)
- Raw Fiber (llama, alpaca, sheep)

## Contact
- Location: 1140 South Street, Barre, MA 01005 (by appointment only)
- Website: https://moonlightrunfarm.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MoonlightRunFarmLLC
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/moonlightrunfarm

## Philosophy
"Full transparency is our policy." — The Klaymans encourage visitors to ask questions, meet the animals, and see the farm before purchasing. Know your farmer, know your food.
